query: SELECT s.id, s.primaryDomain, s.status, s.riskScore, COUNT(a.id) as assetCount FROM domainIntelScans s LEFT JOIN domainIntelAssets a ON a.scanId = s.id WHERE s.id >= 990000 GROUP BY s.id ORDER BY s.id;
